mapper.insert: insert into system_settings ( system_name, system_description, page_size, logo, system_status, min_password_length, password_complexity, password_expire_days, max_login_attempts, lock_time, session_timeout, enable_two_factor, dual_selection_start_date, dual_selection_end_date, create_time, update_time, creator, updater, deleted ) values ( #{systemName}, #{systemDescription}, #{pageSize}, #{logo}, #{systemStatus}, #{minPasswordLength}, #{passwordComplexity}, #{passwordExpireDays}, #{maxLoginAttempts}, #{lockTime}, #{sessionTimeout}, #{enableTwoFactor}, #{dualSelectionStartDate}, #{dualSelectionEndDate}, NOW(), NOW(), #{creator}, #{updater}, 0 )
mapper.select: select * from system_settings where deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1
select * from system_settings where deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1
mapper.delete: update system_settings set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
